metadata.significance: Describes the splitting of heaven and receiving of records

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنشَقَّتْ

translations.en_sahih: When the sky has split [open]
translations.en_yusufali: When the sky is rent asunder,
translations.ms_basmeih: Apabila langit terbelah,

translations.en_sahih: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
translations.en_yusufali: And hearkens to (the Command of) its Lord, and it must needs (do so);-
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta mematuhi perintah Tuhannya, dan sudah semestinya ia patuh;

translations.en_sahih: And when the earth has been extended
translations.en_yusufali: And when the earth is flattened out,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila bumi diratakan,

translations.en_sahih: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]
translations.en_yusufali: And casts forth what is within it and becomes (clean) empty,
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta mengeluarkan apa yang di dalamnya, dan menjadi kosong,

translations.en_sahih: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -
translations.en_yusufali: And hearkens to (the Command of) its Lord,- and it must needs (do so);- (then will come Home the full reality).
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta mematuhi perintah Tuhannya, dan sudah semestinya ia patuh; - (Maka pada saat itu tiap-tiap seorang akan mengetahui apa yang telah dilakukannya).

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya ayyuha alinsanu innaka kadihun ila rabbika kadhan famulaqeehi

translations.en_sahih: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.
translations.en_yusufali: O thou man! Verily thou art ever toiling on towards thy Lord- painfully toiling,- but thou shalt meet Him.
translations.ms_basmeih: Wahai manusia! Sesungguhnya engkau sentiasa berpenat-lelah (menjalankan keadaan hidupmu) dengan sedaya upayamu hinggalah (semasa engkau) kembali kepada Tuhanmu, kemudian engkau tetap menemui balasan apa yang engkau telah usahakan itu (tercatit semuanya).

translations.en_sahih: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
translations.en_yusufali: Then he who is given his Record in his right hand,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian sesiapa yang diberi menerima surat amalnya dengan tangan kanannya, -

translations.en_sahih: He will be judged with an easy account
translations.en_yusufali: Soon will his account be taken by an easy reckoning,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ia akan dihisab dengan cara yang mudah dan ringan,

translations.en_sahih: And return to his people in happiness.
translations.en_yusufali: And he will turn to his people, rejoicing!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ia akan pergi kepada keluarganya (yang beriman) dengan sukacita.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma man ootiya kitabahu waraa thahrihi

translations.en_sahih: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
translations.en_yusufali: But he who is given his Record behind his back,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesiapa yang diberi menerima surat amalnya (dengan tangan kiri), dari sebelah belakangnya,

translations.en_sahih: He will cry out for destruction
translations.en_yusufali: Soon will he cry for perdition,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ia akan meraung menyebut-nyebut kebinasaannya,

translations.en_sahih: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
translations.en_yusufali: And he will enter a Blazing Fire.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ia akan menderita bakaran neraka yang marak menjulang.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
translations.en_yusufali: Truly, did he go about among his people, rejoicing!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebenarnya ia semasa di dunia dahulu bersukaria dalam kalangan keluarganya (yang juga kufur ingkar)!

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].
translations.en_yusufali: Truly, did he think that he would not have to return (to Us)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya ia menyangka bahawa ia tidak sekali-kali akan kembali (kepada Kami untuk menerima balasan) !

ayahs.arabic: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Bala inna rabbahu kana bihi baseeran

translations.en_sahih: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, nay! for his Lord was (ever) watchful of him!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sangkaannya itu tidak betul) bahkan ia tetap kembali! Sesungguhnya Tuhannya sentiasa Melihat dan Mengetahui keadaannya!

translations.en_sahih: So I swear by the twilight glow
translations.en_yusufali: So I do call to witness the ruddy glow of Sunset;
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Aku bersumpah, demi mega;

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the night and what it envelops
translations.en_yusufali: The Night and its Homing;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan malam serta segala yang dihimpunkannya;

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the moon when it becomes full
translations.en_yusufali: And the Moon in her fullness:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bulan apabila (penuh cahayanya) menjadi purnama:

translations.en_sahih: [That] you will surely experience state after state.
translations.en_yusufali: Ye shall surely travel from stage to stage.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya kamu tetap melalui beberapa keadaan yang bertingkat-tingkat baik buruknya, (sebelum kamu menemui Tuhan - menerima kesenangan dan kebahagiaan atau sebaliknya)

translations.en_sahih: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,
translations.en_yusufali: What then is the matter with them, that they believe not?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka apakah alasan bagi mereka bersikap tidak mahu beriman?

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
ayahs.transliteration: Waitha quria AAalayhimu alquranu la yasjudoona

translations.en_sahih: And when the Qur'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allah]?
translations.en_yusufali: And when the Qur'an is read to them, they fall not prostrate,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (apakah pula alasannya) apabila dibacakan Al-Quran kepada mereka, mereka tidak mahu taat dan sujud?

translations.en_sahih: But those who have disbelieved deny,
translations.en_yusufali: But on the contrary the Unbelievers reject (it).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tidak ada satu alasan pun) bahkan orang-orang yang kafir, semata-mata mendustakannya;

translations.en_sahih: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
translations.en_yusufali: But Allah has full knowledge of what they secrete (in their breasts)
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang Allah mengetahui apa yang mereka rahsiakan dalam hati.

translations.en_sahih: So give them tidings of a painful punishment,
translations.en_yusufali: So announce to them a Penalty Grievous,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka khabarkanlah kepada mereka dengan azab yang tidak terperi sakitnya;

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati lahum ajrun ghayru mamnoonin

translations.en_sahih: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
translations.en_yusufali: Except to those who believe and work righteous deeds: For them is a Reward that will never fail.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tetapi orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal soleh mereka beroleh pahala balasan yang tidak putus-putus.
